title: Agents
subtitle: Manage your AI agents — configure personalities, models, and capabilities
gatewayWarning: Gateway is not running. Start it from Settings to manage agents.

empty.title: No Agents Yet
empty.desc: Create your first AI agent to get started. Each agent has its own personality, model, and context.

create.title: Create New Agent
create.description: Set up a new AI agent with its own identity and configuration
create.agentKeyHint: Unique identifier (lowercase, no spaces). e.g. my-assistant
create.displayNameHint: Friendly name shown in the UI
create.agentTypePredefined: Predefined — shared context with user overlay
create.workspaceHint: Workspace must be a separate directory (e.g. ~/.openclaw/workspace-myagent)

detail.title: Agent Details
detail.noFiles: No context files found for this agent

delete.title: Delete Agent
delete.message: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
